ops.body: All criteria met: 41/41 repos render CLAUDE.md from cc-skills:claude-rules (final gate grep clean); zero claude-specific-rules fragments (per-repo gates); all guides.yml checks green; repo-bootstrap v0.42.0 (03c532e7) pytest 195/195 + scaffold smoke resolves import over network; daily cron validated live 23/23 (2026-07-11 ~10:34Z, ~75min lag) — no fallback dispatcher needed. crm migrated via Option 1 after check-back; SECURITY: live ANTHROPIC_API_KEY committed in crm cofounder-scanner/cofounder_scanner/config.py:25-28 (pre-existing), surfaced to user for rotation.
